title: Europe’s Gas-Guzzling Days Are Fading - WSJ
description: In a reality check for natural-gas producers, volatile prices are prompting European homes and factories to go green faster than expected
bodyText: Aug. 21, 2023 6:30 am ET Last year’s hottest gas market has cooled, and some of the change will stick. Demand for natural gas in Europe hasn’t bounced back despite lower prices. The region’s TTF benchmark price is down 85% compared with a year ago, when Europe was rushing to fill its gas-storage facilities for winter after Russia cut off supply.
